items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step 'Validate persona scenario #3' requires confirmation of the scenario behavior regarding payment going to the wrong business. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or validations related to this scenario, nor does it confirm the expected outcome. The linked use cases and prior steps do not provide sufficient context or evidence to assert that the scenario has been adequately tested or validated, leading to an inconclusive status.
